title: Excalibur | Hot Iron Support
description: Excalibur support for the mod Hot Iron.
body:
# Excalibur for Hot Iron
This is an unofficial [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack for the mod [Hot Iron](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hot-iron). All items, blocks, and GUIs have been retexured to mimic the Excalibur style.



## Credits

- [Maffhew](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew) – Excalibur Author
- [RegenStudios](https://www.curseforge.com/members/regenstudios/projects) – Hot Iron Author
